content:
Hello! I will be purchasing a Nvidia GPU to get started on contributing to the Nova project. It's going to be some low-powered card so that I can have it plugged in with my current GPU.

I'm aware that Nova supports cards starting from Turing, so I'm looking at these sort of options:

  • RTX 3050
  • RTX 5050

Would either of these suffice, or are there others to consider for testing purposes?

(Cc: @John Hubbard )

We should have Blackwell covered soon in nova-core, so I think the RTX 5050 is probably the better pick. But I think in the end it doesn't matter too much, both should be fine.

@John Hubbard what do you think?
Yes, the Blackwell card is what I would pick, too. And either one should be ok.
Thank you for the input @Danilo Krummrich and @John Hubbard! I went ahead and purchased the RTX 5050.
